title: Hope
tmdbOverview: After 8-year-old So-won narrowly survives a brutal sexual assault, her family labors to help her heal while coping with their own rage and grief.
synopsis: Hope (2013) is a drama and k-drama film from South Korea. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a G certification (JP rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
